name: Ozark Wilted Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 head leaf lettuce, torn into pieces
1 head Bibb lettuce, watercress, or mustard green, torn into pieces
4 green onions, cut into 1/2 inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine lettuce, onion, and radishes in a large salad bowl; toss lightly.
2. Cook bacon until crisp, and drain on paper towels until cooled. Reserve pan drippings. Crumble bacon and sprinkle over salad.
3. Add sugar, vinegar, salt, and pepper to drippings in skillet. Bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly.
4. Pour immediately over salad; toss lightly, and cover quickly until lettuce wilts.
